prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为10742→12709→11134→16588→16296，整体呈后移趋势，2024年大幅后移至16588后2025年基本持平于16296，近两年累计后移约5000名，波动较大；2021–2025年湖南省物理类计划分别为80、80、79、79、81人，2026年计划增至88人，较2025年扩招约8.6%，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平理工类院校；该校在2026年声誉监测中未出现显著舆情事件，抖音综合热度排名未进入前100，整体曝光度一般；近年无投档断档或异常记录，声誉平稳；电气工程获评A级，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为电力行业核心学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业2024年社会热度评级为高热推荐，能源动力类为推荐（66.43），电子信息/通信为高热推荐（76.86），相关工科专业整体偏热；湖南省物理类考生从2025年320192增至2026年347000，增幅约8.4%，竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）2025年405分较2024年422分下降，反映试卷难度或划线调整；该校位于北京，属地缘优势明显的直辖市，对湖南考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在湖南物理类招生占比约81/320192≈0.025%，属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16296、2026年扩招约8.6%（缓解竞争）、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%（加剧竞争）以及电气类专业持续高热（正面拉动），供需弹性主值约17141名，再考虑考生规模扩大与专业热度的综合作用，预测2026年物理类最低位次约17191名，区间16691–17691名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 10742 → 12709 → 11134 → 16588 → 16296, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward to 16588, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 16296, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5000 positions over the past two years, indicating considerable fluctuation. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category in Hunan Province were 80, 80, 79, 79, and 81 students respectively. In 2026, the plan increased to 88 students, an expansion of about 8.6% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 84th, with a stable ranking range of 75–84 in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper level science and engineering institutions. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, no significant public opinion incidents were detected. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 100, indicating generally average exposure. There have been no records of enrollment gaps or anomalies in recent years, and its reputation remains stable. Electrical Engineering is rated A-level, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics are rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, highly matching the admissions majors, thus exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity rating for Electrical Engineering and Automation was high-heat recommendation, Energy and Power category was recommended (66.43), and Electronic Information/Communication was high-heat recommendation (76.86), indicating overall high popularity for related engineering majors. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) dropped from 422 in 2024 to 405 in 2025, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or scoring adjustments. The university is located in Beijing, a municipality with obvious geographical advantages, exerting a certain cross-provincial appeal to Hunan examinees. Its enrollment proportion in Hunan Physics Category is about 81/320192 ≈ 0.025%, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 16296, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.6% (alleviating competition), the increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees of about 8.4% (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of electrical majors (positive pull), the main supply-demand elasticity value is approximately 17141. Considering the combined effects of examinee scale expansion and major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 17191, with a range of 16691–17691.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16691–17691, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Electronic Information) as reach options, and use Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16500), focus on targeting A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 17500), it is advisable to prioritize stable Tier 2 majors and avoid clustering into popular Tier 1 options.

专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Law has a divided and wait-and-see social popularity, Foreign Language and Literature has average wait-and-see popularity, and Network and New Media is clearly discouraged.
